title: For
description: Renders a list of items reactively. Items are keyed by reference. Only changed items update.
signature: For<T, U>(props: { each: MaybeAccessor<readonly T[] | undefined | null | false>; fallback?: MaybeAccessor<CReactNode>; keyFn?: (item: T) => any; children: (item: Accessor<T>, index: Accessor<number>) => U }): JSXElement
prop_each_desc: Reactive array to iterate over. Accepts a value or an accessor.
prop_fallback_desc: Optional content when the list is empty.
prop_keyfn_desc: Optional key function for stable item identity.
